theme_archetype.description: Tactical RPG Dark: A heavy, immersive dark mode focusing on forge, iron, and fire tones. Incorporates 16-bit retro UI patterns with modern mobile-first constraints.

layout_and_spacing.mobile_first_wrapper: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#09090B] relative pb-20 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden
layout_and_spacing.card: bg-[#18181B] border-2 border-[#3F3F46] rounded-none p-4 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] transition-transform

button.primary: bg-[#FF4500] hover:bg-[#DC2626] text-white font-['Press_Start_2P'] text-xs py-4 px-6 border-2 border-[#FF8C00] hover:border-[#FF4500] rounded-none shadow-[inset_-2px_-2px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4),_4px_4px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-y-[2px] active:translate-x-[2px] active:shadow-[inset_-1px_-1px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4),_1px_1px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all
button.secondary: bg-[#27272A] hover:bg-[#3F3F46] text-zinc-100 font-['Press_Start_2P'] text-xs py-4 px-6 border-2 border-[#52525B] shadow-[inset_-2px_-2px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4),_4px_4px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-y-[2px] active:translate-x-[2px] transition-all
button.upgrade_btn: bg-[#18181B] border-2 border-[#52525B] text-[#FF4500] w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center font-['Press_Start_2P'] hover:bg-[#27272A] active:scale-95

input.base: bg-[#09090B] border-2 border-[#52525B] text-zinc-100 font-['IBM_Plex_Sans'] px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#FF4500] placeholder-zinc-600 rounded-none w-full

progress_bar.container: h-6 bg-[#09090B] border-2 border-[#3F3F46] w-full rounded-none overflow-hidden relative
progress_bar.fill: h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#DC2626] to-[#FF4500] transition-all duration-500 ease-out shadow-[inset_0_2px_4px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)]

bottom_nav.container: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto bg-[#18181B] border-t-2 border-[#3F3F46] flex justify-around items-center h-16 z-50
bottom_nav.item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-full text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-300

modals.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4
modals.content: bg-[#18181B] border-4 border-[#3F3F46] w-full max-w-sm p-6 shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] relative

images.description: Warrior character class selection icon. Use in Onboarding screen.
Rogue character class selection icon. Use in Onboarding screen.
Camp resting area background. Use as an ambient hero background image in the Camp screen.
Emberwood Forest zone background. Use in Exploration Map screen.
Ironpeak Mountain zone background. Use in Exploration Map screen.
Ashveil Desert zone background. Use in Exploration Map screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: No Backend: Everything must be stored in browser LocalStorage. Create a custom React hook (e.g. useGameData) to manage character state, XP, levels, and unlocked zones.
Mobile-first strictly: Render the app within a max-w-md centered container on large screens to maintain the app feel. The Bottom Navigation must stick to this container, not the full screen width.
Data-testid requirement: EVERY interactive element (buttons, inputs, navigation items, stat upgrades) MUST have a kebab-case data-testid (e.g., data-testid='log-workout-btn').
Font Loading: You MUST inject the Google Fonts link into the index.html or load it globally. Extend Tailwind's font-family to include 'Press Start 2P' and 'IBM Plex Sans'.
Component Overrides: Shadcn is likely too clean for this. You must override Shadcn primitive classes with the blocky, 16-bit neumorphic styles provided in this JSON.
Images handling: For zone backgrounds, apply a dark overlay (bg-black/60) so text stays legible on top.
